data.title: Coinbase emphasizes Algorand, Aptos' efforts against quantum threats. Quantum computing isn't an immediate threat, but urging for upgrades as some blockchains are less prepared. Advisory board stresses the need to enhance security measures.
data.description: The quantum advisory board of Coinbase, a leading cryptocurrency platform, has stated that quantum computing does not currently pose a threat. However, they emphasized the need for immediate upgrading efforts to ensure security. It was highlighted that certain blockchains are less equipped to handle quantum threats compared to others. This advisory comes at a time when the industry is increasingly aware of the potential risks posed by quantum technology. It serves as a call to action for companies to fortify their systems against potential future threats.

data.title: Justin Sun files lawsuit against World Liberty Financial for token lockup, asserting his rights as a WLFI token holder.
data.description: Sun filed a lawsuit to defend his rights as a WLFI token holder and clarified that it doesn't alter his backing of US President Donald Trump and his administration's push for a crypto-friendly America.

The IRGC emphasizes staying alert in what it calls a “silent battlefield” and tracking enemy moves during the “so-called ceasefire,” according to Mehr.
IRGC Statement: The IRGC is prepared to present achievements and greater surprises beyond the enemy's realm of comprehension and calculation in the battlefield.
The IRGC says it stands prepared to face any fresh aggression and will inflict severe damage on enemy assets in the event of renewed conflict, according to Mehr.

China announces completion of its military drills in the western Pacific, per official statement.

data.title: Sanofi's Tzield now US-approved to delay stage 3 type 1 diabetes onset in young kids, a significant development. #healthcare #diabetes
data.description: A recent report states that the global economy is expected to grow by 4.2% in 2022, a significant increase from the 3.5% growth recorded in 2021. This growth is primarily fueled by strong performances in advanced economies, with the United States leading the way with a projected growth rate of 3.9%. Emerging market and developing economies are also expected to see growth of around 5.3%. However, there are concerns about inflationary pressures and supply chain disruptions that could potentially hinder this growth trajectory. The report also highlights the importance of continued policy support to ensure sustained economic recovery and reduce inequality worldwide.

Trifork North America names Patrick Lamb as CEO.

data.title: Corbion announces quarterly sales of € 293.7m and Adjusted EBITDA of € 37.8m; maintains full-year outlook
data.description: Corbion, a publicly-traded sustainable ingredient company based in Amsterdam, has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, which ended on March 31st. The company focuses on promoting preservation using scientific methods.
Coop Pank unaudited financial results for Q1 2026

data.title: Tosca and Cabka Launch New Circular Pallet, Setting a New Benchmark for Sustainable FMCG Logistics
data.description: Tosca has collaborated with Cabka to introduce a cutting-edge circular pallet to the market, catering to contemporary supply chains. This automation-friendly pallet is PPWR-compliant and serves as a circular solution to traditional one-way packaging. Boasting efficiency, safety, and sustainability benefits, it optimizes operations from production through to retail.

data.title: Update: Sanofi informs on Sarclisa subcutaneous regulatory submission in US. No. of doses and timeline undisclosed.
data.description: In the recent report, it was revealed that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.7%, marking a significant improvement from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. This decrease represents 340,000 job opportunities that were created in various sectors across the country. Additionally, the report highlighted a surge in the stock market, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this positive trend to the government's economic policies and the successful vaccination campaign, which has boosted consumer confidence and led to increased spending. The construction industry saw the most significant growth, with a 10% increase in new projects compared to last year. As the economy continues to recover, analysts are optimistic about the future outlook and project further improvements in the coming months.

data.title: Ojemda® approved in the European Union as the first targeted therapy in relapsed or refractory pediatric low-grade glioma regardless of BRAF alteration
data.description: In Paris, France on 22 April 2026, Ipsen disclosed that the European Commission has given conditional marketing approval for Ojemda ® (tovorafenib) as a standalone treatment for individuals aged 6 months and above with pediatric low-grade-glioma containing a BRAF fusion or rearrangement, or BRAF V600 mutation, who have shown progression after one or more previous systemic treatments. This decision from the EC is valid in all 27 EU Member States, in addition to Iceland, Liechtenstein, and Norway.
